name: Haematology
description: Complete blood analysis including CBC, ESR, blood grouping, peripheral smear, and coagulation profile.

name: Diabetes & Metabolic
description: Comprehensive diabetes screening and metabolic health monitoring including fasting sugar, HbA1c, and insulin levels.

name: Heart & Lipid Health
description: Cardiac risk assessment with lipid profile, cardiac markers, and inflammatory markers for heart health monitoring.

name: Liver & Kidney Function
description: Organ function assessment through liver and kidney panels, electrolytes, and uric acid testing.

name: Thyroid & Hormones
description: Thyroid function testing and hormonal evaluation including fertility hormones and pregnancy markers.

name: Vitamins & Nutrition
description: Nutritional deficiency screening for vitamins, minerals, and essential elements critical for overall health.

name: Infectious Disease Testing
description: Rapid and reliable testing for common infectious diseases including dengue, malaria, typhoid, and more.

name: Urine, Stool & Body Fluids
description: Clinical pathology including routine urine and stool examination, semen analysis, and body fluid testing.

name: Microbiology & Culture
description: Culture and sensitivity testing for bacterial, fungal, and mycobacterial infections with antibiotic guidance.

name: Cytology & Histopathology
description: Tissue and cell analysis including FNAC, Pap smear, and biopsy reporting for accurate diagnosis.

name: Cancer & Specialized Screening
description: Tumour marker testing, allergy panels, and autoimmune screening for comprehensive health evaluation.
